metadata.description: Local-first code intelligence for AI agents — instant code search, symbol resolution, impact analysis, dependency graphs, and context packs across any codebase. Works offline. No data leaves your machine.

plugins.name: open-kioku
plugins.description: Local-first code intelligence for AI agents — instant BM25 + regex code search, symbol resolution, call-graph traversal, impact analysis, architecture detection, and token-efficient context packs. Runs entirely on your machine via a native binary. Index once, query instantly. Supports Rust, TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, and JavaScript.
